title: erysimum stenophyllum
intro: Erysimum stenophyllum, also known as crested wallflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Erysimum stenophyllum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Erysimum stenophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
